name: hb_1_5
requirements: As part of your analysis, for enterprises in 沧州市 (Cangzhou) on 2025-06-08 compute and store: total_city_flue_gas (float), active_company_count (int), top_emitter_company_id (int), top_emitter_total (float).

turns.query: Help me analyze the emission patterns of enterprises in 沧州市 on 2025-06-08.
